Steps:
1. Access the Login Screen as an unauthenticated user.
2. Log out from an authenticated page and access the Login Screen.
3. Attempt to access the Login Screen while authenticated.
Expected_Result:
1. The Login Screen is displayed.
2. The system redirects to the Login Screen after logout.
3. The authenticated user is redirected to the main application page.

Steps:
1. Open the Login Screen.
2. Inspect the header area for Logo (A.1.Logo Sun Annual Awards 2025/Logo Sun Annual Awards 2025).
3. Resize the browser window to various sizes.
4. Attempt to interact with the Logo.
Expected_Result:
1. ---
2. The Logo Sun Annual Awards 2025 (A.1.Logo Sun Annual Awards 2025/Logo Sun Annual Awards 2025) is displayed at the top-left of the header section.
3. The logo maintains its position at the top-left across all window sizes.
4. The logo is not interactive (click/hover has no effect).

Steps:
1. Open the Login Screen.
2. Inspect the header area for the Language selector (A.2.Language/Language).
3. Resize the browser window to various sizes.
Expected_Result:
1. ---
2. The Language selector (A.2.Language/Language) is displayed at the top-right of the header section.
3. The Language selector remains at the top-right for all window sizes.

Steps:
1. Open the Login Screen.
2. Scroll the page up and down.
3. Hover and click the footer (D.Chân trang/Footer).
Expected_Result:
1. The footer (D.Chân trang/Footer) is visible and fixed at the bottom of the page.
2. The footer remains visible and stationary regardless of scrolling.
3. The footer is not interactive (no actions on click or hover).
